claim_boundary: Published Gaussian summary coordinates for comparison only. These are not the underlying calibrator, host-galaxy, supernova, or covariance likelihoods and must not be multiplied with Pantheon+ as if independent.
combination_rule: Select exactly one anchor at a time. Entries sharing a correlation_group are alternative summaries of overlapping data and must never be multiplied together.

context_references.label: Planck 2018 base-LambdaCDM
context_references.model_dependency: Inferred under spatially flat six-parameter base-LambdaCDM.

anchors.label: SH0ES 2022 Cepheid + SN Ia
anchors.method: Cepheid-calibrated Type Ia supernova distance ladder
anchors.source_title: A Comprehensive Measurement of the Local Value of the Hubble Constant with 1 km/s/Mpc Uncertainty from the Hubble Space Telescope and the SH0ES Team
anchors.note: Baseline published Gaussian summary. The underlying Pantheon+/SH0ES data overlap the app's Pantheon+ compilation.

anchors.label: CCHP 2024 combined JWST ladder
anchors.method: Flat-prior combination of TRGB, JAGB, and Cepheid JWST calibrations
anchors.source_title: Status Report on the Chicago-Carnegie Hubble Program: Three Independent Astrophysical Determinations of the Hubble Constant Using the James Webb Space Telescope
anchors.note: Statistical and systematic uncertainties are combined in quadrature for the displayed pull only.

anchors.label: CCHP 2024 JWST TRGB
anchors.method: Tip of the Red Giant Branch calibrated Type Ia supernova ladder
anchors.source_title: Status Report on the Chicago-Carnegie Hubble Program: Three Independent Astrophysical Determinations of the Hubble Constant Using the James Webb Space Telescope
anchors.note: Alternative CCHP calibration; do not combine with other CCHP rows.

anchors.label: CCHP 2024 JWST JAGB
anchors.method: J-region Asymptotic Giant Branch calibrated Type Ia supernova ladder
anchors.source_title: Status Report on the Chicago-Carnegie Hubble Program: Three Independent Astrophysical Determinations of the Hubble Constant Using the James Webb Space Telescope
anchors.note: Alternative CCHP calibration; do not combine with other CCHP rows.

anchors.label: CCHP 2024 JWST Cepheid
anchors.method: JWST Cepheid calibrated Type Ia supernova ladder
anchors.source_title: Status Report on the Chicago-Carnegie Hubble Program: Three Independent Astrophysical Determinations of the Hubble Constant Using the James Webb Space Telescope
anchors.note: Alternative CCHP calibration; do not combine with other CCHP rows.
